docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $12,500.00 FILED BY REID, BENJAMIN F AS TO DEFENDANT STATEFARM MUTUAL AUTOMOBILE INSURANCE COMPANY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-18-2025 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

REQUEST TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF REID, BENJAMIN F ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) BENITA SELOR FILED BY DEFENDANT STATEFARM MUTUAL AUTOMOBILE INSURANCE COMPANY

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-18-2025 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO AUG-01-2025 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. VISITING JUDGE: CINDEE MAYFIELD. APPEARANCES: PLAINTIFF BENJAMIN F REID IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT STATEFARM MUTUAL AUTOMOBILE INSURANCE CO., IS PRESENT. CLERK: M. DE LUNA. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. NOT REPORTED (D506).
ORDER FOR CONTINUANCE RE: PROOF OF SERVICE
TRIAL RESET TO AUG-19-2025 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506 TRIAL OF AUG-01-2025 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVICE FEE: $50.00 (WAIVED) SERVED JUN-10-2025, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT STATEFARM MUTUAL AUTOMOBILE INSURANCE COMPANY
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVICE FEE WAS $50.00(WAIVED) SERVED JUL-31-2025, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT STATEFARM MUTUAL AUTOMOBILE INSURANCE COMPANY

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF AUG-19-2025 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF AUG-19-2025 BY VISITING JUDGE CINDEE MAYFIELD. APPEARANCES: PLAINTIFF BENJAMIN F REID IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT STATE FARM MUTUAL AUTOMOBILE INSURANCE COMPANY IS PRESENT. CLERK: M. DE LUNA. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. NOT REPORTED. (D506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF REID, BENJAMIN F RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT STATEFARM MUTUAL AUTOMOBILE INSURANCE COMPANY $12,500.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $12,500.00, BASED ON WRONGFUL DENIAL OF PLAINTIFF'S INSURANCE CLAIM FOR STOLEN 2008 CADILLAC DTS PLATINUM. THIS AWARD INCLUDES DAMAGES FOR VEHICLE STORAGE, LOSS OF USE, AND VEHICLE DAMAGE DUE TO THEFT. THE EVIDENCE STATE FARM GATHERED DURING ITS BELATED INVESTIGATION WAS EQUIVOVAL, AND DID NOT CONVINCINGLY SUPPORT STATE FARM'S CONCLUSION THAT PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM WAS BASED ON "MATERIAL MISREPRESENTATIOMS." STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-19-2025 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF REID, BENJAMIN F RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT STATEFARM MUTUAL AUTOMOBILE INSURANCE COMPANY $12,500.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $12,500.00, BASED ON WRONGFUL DENIAL OF PLAINTIFF'S INSURANCE CLAIM FOR STOLEN 2008 CADILLAC DTS PLATINUM.
